UW-35  FILLET WELD DIMENSIONS. (a) The minimum size of fillet welds used in pressure vessel construction shall be as specified in this paragraph. (b) Fillet weld leg size shall not be less than the smaller of the following: the thickness of the thinner part joined, or the values listed in Table UW-35. (c) For attachment welds at openings, the requirements of UW-16 shall also be met. The weld shall develop sufficient strength for the design loads of UG-22. For plug welds, see UW-17. Nozzle-to-shell fillet welds shall comply with UW-49. Refer to UW-15 for acceptable joint configurations.
